narrative: LOTO attempted on cabinet PNL-7. Energy sources not fully identified; secondary 24V control circuit overlooked. Affected personnel not notified. Equipment shut down via emergency stop button only, not normal sequence. Isolation incomplete — no visible open verified, only an interlock relied upon. No lock applied; tag only. Stored energy not released (large capacitors present). Voltage detected after isolation — must STOP and re-isolate but technician proceeded with energized work. Missing live-dead-live verification. Cannot establish energized work permit — qualified person + manager signature absent.
